narrative.intro: Paris condemnations, Montpellier medicine, Rupescissa's prophetic pharmacy, Flamel's posthumous legend — France as alchemy's argumentative centre.
narrative.provenance_note: Regions = 'France' (67 events) + 'France/Alsace' (7). Events from the ALCHEMYTIMELINEMAP corpus (largely draft-status); locations are event geocodes, not residences. Absence on this map reflects gaps in the record.
narrative.design_note: Woodcut & Rubric: Paris condemnations and university disputation — black letter, red rubric, hard edges.
